HTAN Phase 2 Data Release Validation
  • Provenance Validator
  • View page source

Provenance Validator

This module outlines the HTANProvenanceValidator class, which inherits the BaseValidator class. The HTANProvenanceValidator performs validation checks across metadata tables to ensure the integrity of the HTAN entity provenance chain with the following checks:

1. Center-level Record Completeness: Ensures each HTAN center has submitted at least one Biospecimen and one Demographics record.

2. Parent-to-Participant Linkages: Verifies that Participant IDs referenced as Biospecimen Parent IDs exist as a Demographics record.

3. Participants in Non-Demographics Tables: Ensures that Participant IDs used in non-Demographics record sets are present in the Demographics table.

4. Biospecimen-to-File Linkages: Ensures that Biospecimen IDs are linked to files via the provenance table.

5. Panel-to-File Linkages: Ensures that Panel metadata (Channel and Spatial) are linked to Files and that all Panel metadata provided exists in the ChannelMetadata and SpatialPanel record sets.

6. Data File ID Cross-Validation: Ensures that each HTAN_DATA_FILE_ID is unique across all centers.

class htan_validators.provenance_validator.HTANProvenanceValidator

Bases: BaseValidator

Validator for HTAN provenance chain checks.

check_bio_and_demo_record_per_center(df, id_prov, component)

Ensures that each HTAN center that has submitted data to the active release cycle has submitted at least one Biospecimen and one Demographics record.

Parameters:

  • df (pandas.DataFrame) – Component-level metadata table.

  • id_prov (pandas.DataFrame) – Provenance table.

  • component (str) – Component being validated.

Returns:

Provenance table with errors.

Return type:

id_prov (pandas.DataFrame)

check_biospecimen_linked_to_files(df, id_prov)

Validate that all record set Biospecimen IDs are linked to files, and that all Biospecimen IDs linked to files exist in the Biospecimen metadata table.

Parameters:

  • df (pandas.DataFrame) – Component-level metadata table.

  • id_prov (pandas.DataFrame) – Provenance table.

Returns:

Component-level metadata table.

Return type:

df (pandas.DataFrame)

check_panel_data(df, table_id, metadata_type, client)

Validate panel ID linkage between File metadata and panel (channel) metadata.

Parameters:

  • df (pandas.DataFrame) – Component-level metadata table.

  • table_id (str) – BigQuery table name.

  • metadata_type (str) – Metadata type (Files or Records).

  • client (BigQuery instance) – BigQuery client object.

Returns:

Component-level metadata table.

Return type:

df (pandas.DataFrame)

check_parent_to_participant_linkages(client, df, demo_df)

Validate that Participant IDs referenced as HTAN_PARENT_IDs exist in the Demographics metadata table.

Parameters:

  • df (pandas.DataFrame) – Component-level metadata table.

  • demo_df (pandas.DataFrame) – Demographics metadata table.

Returns:

Component-level metadata table.

Return type:

df (pandas.DataFrame)

check_participants_in_non_demographics(df, demo_df)

Ensure that Participant IDs in non-Demographics tables exist in the Demographics metadata table.

Parameters:

  • df (pandas.DataFrame) – Component-level metadata table.

  • demo_df (pandas.DataFrame) – Demographics metadata table.

Returns:

Component-level metadata table.

Return type:

df (pandas.DataFrame)

prov_cross_validation(id_prov)

Ensure that each HTAN_DATA_FILE_ID uniquely maps to a single file.

Parameters:

id_prov (pandas.DataFrame) – Provenance table.

Returns:

Provenance table with appended errors.

Return type:

id_prov (pandas.DataFrame)

validate(client, df, id_prov, metadata_type, component)

Execute all provenance validation checks for a given component.

Parameters:

  • client (BigQuery instance) – BigQuery client object.

  • df (pandas.DataFrame) – Component-level metadata table.

  • id_prov (pandas.DataFrame) – Provenance table.

  • metadata_type (str) – Metadata type (Files or Records).

  • component (str) – Component being validated.

Returns:

  • Updated metadata table with errors logged.

  • Updated provenance table with errors logged.

Return type:

tuple[pandas.DataFrame, pandas.DataFrame]
